title: Ransomware Horror
description: Ransomware is a new horror mod made just in a few days. Currently adds a few entities that will try to kill you. Lore is  WIP.
body:
Ransomware is a brand new freshly baked shitty horror mod for people who are scared of The Man From The Fog and Cave Dweller.

Adds 4 brand new entities:
**The Watcher** - silently watches you
**Ransom** - tall entity that tries to kill you
**Multi Faced** - tall humanoid with long arms and 2 faces
**Denial** - the end of everything, tries to kill you at ANY price

I recommend using Sound Physics Remastered and some shaders with this mod.



SPOILERS BELOW:

These are the four  entities this mod currently adds:



1) The Watcher: its main goal is only to watch you and laugh sometimes. It is not harmful for you.
2) Ransom: tall black creature that will try to kill you, but only if you attack it first. Not that harmful.
3) Multi Faced: tall monster with two faces which is going to try killing you when it gets an opportunity. May be harmful.
4) Denial: the end of all, kills you with no exceptions. A black tall humanoid with curved spine and huge head.
